content.vision: To be the most reliable automobile distributor in Cambodia and the region by uniting people and cars, contributing to the society, and caring for the environment.
mission: Develop motorization in Cambodia and the region by uniting people and cars, contributing to the society, and caring for the environment.
Constantly improve upon and provide the best quality products and services to all customers.
Ensure that all our customers in Cambodia are the most satisfied car owners.
Ensure that our staff and customers are proud of being members of Toyota Cambodia.
Build and maintain a strong, trusting relationship among all stakeholders.
Our service standards must exceed our customers' expectations. We must have a professional, sophisticated company culture that will impress our customers.

history.event: Acquired 1st License for Joint Venture Investment
Acquired License as Toyota Authorized Service Station (TASS) From TMC
Grand Opening of New Toyota Office, Phnom Penh
Reopening of Toyota Office, after heavy damage by Civil War in July 1997
Acquired License as Exclusive Solely Toyota Distributor with MOC
Changed Company Name from TTHK to TOYOTA (CAMBODIA) CO., LTD.
Opened 2S Branch at Phnom Penh: Phnom Penh Branch
Opened 3S Branch at Battambang
Opened 3S Branch at Siem Reap
Opened 1S Branch at Phnom Penh: Boeung Keng Kang Branch
Opened 2S Branch at Phnom Penh: Toul Kork Branch
Opened 1S Branch at Phnom Penh: Teuk Thla Branch
Opened Toyota Plus Branch at Phnom Penh
Opened Logistic and Training Center (LTC) at Phnom Penh
Opened 3S Branch at Phnom Penh: Bak Touk Branch
Head Office Building Demolished
Closed Toul Kork Branch
Opened Toul Sangke Branch
Close Phnom Penh Branch
Grand Opening of the New Headquarters Building and Main Branch
Closed old location of Siem Reap Banch
Grand opening of new location of Siem Reap Branch
Opened 1s Branch at Kampong Cham
Opened 3s Branch at Mean Chey
Opened Toyota Plus New Location at Mean Chey
Closed Old Location of Battambang
Opened New Location for Battambang
Grand Opening Lexus Showroom

To be the most reliable automobile distributor in Cambodia and the region by uniting people and cars, contributing to the society, and caring for the environment.
Develop motorization in Cambodia and the region by uniting people and cars, contributing to the society, and caring for the environment.
Constantly improve upon and provide the best quality products and services to all customers.
Ensure that all our customers in Cambodia are the most satisfied car owners.
Ensure that our staff and customers are proud of being members of Toyota Cambodia.
Build and maintain a strong, trusting relationship among all stakeholders.
Our service standards must exceed our customers' expectations. We must have a professional, sophisticated company culture that will impress our customers.
